## ✨ Features
- 🎧 Audio + Video streaming  
- 🚫 No API required  
- 🚫 No cookies required  
- ⚡ Fast & smooth playback  
- 🔒 Safe & lightweight  

---

## 🚀 Deploy

```bash
# Clone Repo
git clone https://github.com/xbitcode/music
cd music

# System Setup
sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
sudo apt install ffmpeg python3-pip git -y

# Virtual Environment
pip3 install virtualenv
virtualenv venv
source venv/bin/activate

# Install Requirements
pip install -U pip
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Config Setup
cp sample.env .env
nano .env

# Start Bot
bash start


---

🔁 Run 24/7

sudo apt install tmux -y
tmux
bash start

Detach → Ctrl + B then D
```
